heading: Enlisted members: discharge for hardship
label: 1173 Enlisted members: discharge for hardship
text: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary concerned, a regular enlisted member of an armed force who has dependents may be discharged for hardship.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under , Pay and Allowances of the Uniformed Services.July 1, 1973section 206 of Pub. L. 93–64section 401 of Title 37
